title: MAXIJIN Thick Velvet Sofa Covers 2 Seater Super Stretchy Loveseat Covers for Living Room Dogs Cat Pet Plush Love Seat Couch Slipcovers Elastic Furniture Protector (2 Seater, Grey)
features: SUPER SOFT VELVET: MAXIJIN upgraded sofa covers are furnished with luxurious velvet plush, so the fabric achieves extra soft handle with short and dense hairiness. The thickened fabric is no pilling, no fading, durable, skin-friendly and breathable for all seasons. And the combination of healthy staining and fine workmanship ensures the high quality. It also comes in various colors, which enhances the decor of your living room and instantly brightens up your old furniture

SUPER STRETCHY - MAXIJIN magic sofa cover is made of 95% polyester and 5% spandex velvety fleece. Due to the addition of high density stretchable spandex fiber, it will easily fit whether your sofa is large or small, no deformation. A real universal couch cover for fitting most fabric or leather t-cushion couches, high back couches. Adopts natural active printing and dyeing process, so the fabric color is more beautiful. Healthy and Eco-friendly

REAL ANTI-SLIP: Bonus with foam rods in the package, tucking into the creases of sofa seat cushion after installation of loveseat slipcover, not only to make the fitted couch covers 2 seater looks neat and wrinkle-free, just like a custom-made couch protector cover for your sofa. It also prevents the love seat cover from moving when a person stands up or the pet jumps. Moreover, there is an elastic band on furniture cover to wrap around sofa bottom tightly for better anti-skid effect

FULL PROTECTION - Our one piece premium sofa protector cover adopts the full-coverage design, which fully covers your sofa. Not only make your old sofa new, just like replacing it with a new sofa, but also protect it from stains, dust, wear and sunlight causing sofa to shed or fade, pet, dog, cats scratching, etc. It will greatly save you the cost and time of maintaining and cleaning your sofa set. Its strapless design makes it very EASY to install and take off for washing

SIZE & EASY CARE - Please choose the right slip cover size according to Measuring Guide in photos. The Chair cover fits armchair of 31"-46"(78-116cm) in length, Loveseat cover fits couch of 55"-69"(139-175cm), Sofa slipcover fits couch of 71"-91"(180-231cm), XL Sofa cover fits couch of 91"-110"(231-279cm). Machine Washable separately on the gentle cycle, Do Not Bleach. Tumble dry low. We provide 24*7 friendly customer support and also back our products for 2 Years, 100% RISK-FREE PURCHASE
